description: A settlement on Ābādān island, which is located at the head of the Persian Gulf. The name of the city derives from that of the island; the city is first mentioned by this name in the 9th century CE.

names.details: ‘Abbādān: A town in the province of ‘Irāḳ (Iraq). It is on the coast of Baḥr-i Fārs (Persian Sea). It is one and half day's journey away from Baṣra (Basra). [translation]
